steps.title: Identify the key scenario
steps.content: The phrase "two or three individuals" establishes that sometimes multiple people share the Nobel Prize. The blank must describe how a single award is distributed among them.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank describes how one Nobel Prize is given to two or three people. Substitute each word into "the award is given ______":

A. Ceremoniously means with elaborate ritual or formality. All Nobel Prizes are given ceremoniously — this doesn't explain the two-or-three-person situation at all.

B. Reluctantly means unwillingly. The passage gives no indication the committee is reluctant to share the prize; it describes the practice as a deliberate choice to reward multiple contributors.

C. Jointly means together at the same time, shared among multiple parties. "The award is given jointly" to two or three individuals — one prize, multiple recipients, simultaneously. ✓

D. Retroactively means applying to the past. The 2008 example shows living recipients receiving the prize for recent work; there is no suggestion the award is given after the fact.

C is correct.
